sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103151" key="terhdonismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τερηδον-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n103151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carious condition</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κρανίου</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.22</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
